Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

2 out of 2 hunks FAILED -- saving rejects to file fs/ext4/ext4.h.rej
 8 out of 11 hunks FAILED -- saving rejects to file fs/ext4/extents_status.c.rej
 1 out of 4 hunks FAILED -- saving rejects to file fs/ext4/super.c.rej

Patch Set 1:

Jian, please just remove extent status shrink patches from this kernel series:


rhel7.6/ext4-track-extent-status-tree-shrinker-delay-statict.patch
rhel7.6/ext4-remove-extent-status-procfs-files-if-journal-lo.patch
rhel7.6/ext4-change-LRU-to-round-robin-in-extent-status-tree.patch
rhel7.6/ext4-move-handling-of-list-of-shrinkable-inodes-into.patch
rhel7.6/ext4-limit-number-of-scanned-extents-in-status-tree-.patch
rhel7.6/ext4-cleanup-flag-definitions-for-extent-status-tree.patch
rhel7.6/ext4-introduce-aging-to-extent-status-tree.patch

RHEL7.8 has adopted these changes already luckily.

Patch Set 1:

And it was declared in the notes:

ext4: change LRU to round-robin in extent status tree shrinker (BZ#1847343)

Patch Set 1: -Code-Review

Thank you, Shilong.
Uploaded patch set 2.

parents.subject: LU-13645 ldlm: re-process ldlm lock cleanup

commit.subject: LU-13830 kernel: kernel update RHEL7.8 [3.10.0-1127.18.2.el7]
commit.message:
LU-13830 kernel: kernel update RHEL7.8 [3.10.0-1127.18.2.el7]

Update RHEL7.8 kernel to 3.10.0-1127.18.2.el7.

The extent status tree shrinker patches are removed from the
RHEL 7.8 kernel patch series because the following bug fix is
included in this version:

ext4: change LRU to round-robin in extent status tree shrinker (BZ#1847343)

Test-Parameters: clientdistro=el7.8 serverdistro=el7.8

Change-Id: Ie3c429f1fdec8add4ac52fa76bfe18834326e338
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
